headline: Mastercard Crypto Partner Program Links Card Network To On Chain Growth
summary: Mastercard (NYSE:MA) has launched a global Crypto Partner Program aimed at accelerating digital asset adoption across its card network. The initiative brings together more than 85 crypto-native firms, financial institutions, and payment providers to build secure on-chain payment solutions. Modern Treasury joins as an on and off ramp provider, helping connect fiat payments with blockchain based value flows. For Mastercard, best known for its global card and payments network, this move...

headline: The Mastercard Collection: Savor the Extraordinary with Mastercard's Asia Gourmet Circle Program
summary: As part of The Mastercard Collection, cardholders globally can now enjoy new and enhanced culinary benefits at the most sought-after restaurants across 10 Asia Pacific (APAC) markets with the Asia Gourmet Circle program. The dining program is an exclusive gateway where cardholders can instantly check reservation availability and book tables at top-tier dining establishments in APAC and around the world.
